data.title: 10 steps for a smooth and rewarding ERP journey
data.description: In this third of a 3-part series on ERP technology and strategies, Magnus Meier, the global vice president for wholesale distribution at business software company SAP, who teaches a “Digital Distribution” graduate-level course at Texas A&M, offers a 10-step process for implementing an ERP system and realizing its benefits in association with employees, customers and technology partners.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Is Amazon the largest online retailer? See for yourself
data.description: Amazon's status as the largest online retailer remains firm in the U.S., but comparing it to Walmart and Alibaba shows where it still has room to grow.

data.title: MeasureUp expands B2B ecommerce with AI training
data.description: Along with its ecommerce platform, MeasureUp plans to introduce an upgraded AI-powered Learning Locker in the second half of next year.

data.title: Suger.io raises big money to expand cloud marketplace automation
data.description: Since its founding in 2022, Suger.io has rapidly grown, quadrupling its annual recurring revenue in 2024 and scaling to around 200 customers, including Snowflake, Intel, Fivetran, DBT Labs, Notion, and ContentSquare.

data.title: Wesco pushes ahead with $500 million digital transformation plans
data.description: Key achievements so far include the integration of generative AI analytics, automation of order fulfillment, and improvements in working capital efficiency.
